purpose: First real historical IWM Ideal replay v1 fixture. This fixture copies validated 1H RTH source OHLCV rows and covers signal/stage/lifecycle candidate shape only; it excludes trade outcomes, option economics, account sizing, broker execution, live trade decisions, and auto-trading.
boundary_notes: Each fixture row includes only validated IWM source candles available at or before that row timestamp.
OHLCV values are copied from the validated source CSV without edits or fabricated market data.
Macro, IV, event, 24H, exact trigger, exact invalidation, final blocker, and final proof fields remain unconfirmed or TO REVIEW where repo evidence does not prove them.
Expected output rows are signal/stage/lifecycle candidate assertions only, not live trade instructions or execution recommendations.
This fixture does not include P&L, option contract economics, account sizing, trade outcome, broker/order/execution content, or auto-trading behavior.

lifecycle_rows.source_only_basis: Completed rows through this timestamp show IWM upside context from the 2026-05-05 base and 2026-05-06 advance before the later 2026-05-12 pullback/retest and 2026-05-13/2026-05-14 recovery area; later rows are not used.
